# bobyqa state v1

routine initxf

npt 4
rho_begin 0.5
rho_end 9.9999999999999995e-07
max_fun 500
seq 1
entry
scalar maxfun 500
scalar ftarget                 -Infinity

vector xl  -5.0000000000000000E+000  -5.0000000000000000E+000
vector xu   5.0000000000000000E+000   5.0000000000000000E+000

exit
vector x0   1.0000000000000000E+000   2.0000000000000000E+000
imatrix ij 2 0

scalar nf 4
